caption: Two men are positioned in front of a television and a shelf of media cases in an indoor setting. On the left, a man with short grey hair wears a dark green t-shirt. On the right, a man with reddish-brown hair and a beard wears a grey t-shirt and a necklace. Above them, a neon sign reads "YOUR STUPID REACTIONS". On-screen text identifies the men as "@RICKSEGALL" and "@KORBINMILES", with a "PATREON" logo located between them. As the sequence progresses, the man on the left speaks and gestures with his hands, moving from a still posture to raising his hand and then opening both palms. The man on the right remains largely stationary, resting his chin on his hand with his finger near his mouth, though he shifts his gaze toward the man on the left by the final frame.
